description: Composition Brown tunic made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has three-quarter sleeves, round split neck, buttoned chest placket, pin tucks on either sides of the placket, curved hem and split side seams Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This simple yet stylish printed tunic from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western tunic blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas, leggings or even jeggings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
